ATTY. DENNIS H. CARR, TEL. NO. 885-0996 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS AND MOVING PARTY CHUN TAM ET. AL.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CHUN TAM'S Motion To Set Aside Entry Of Default And Default Judgment IS DENIED; THE MOTION IS UNTIMELY RELIEF WAS NOT DILIGENTLY SOUGHT; DEFENDANT HAS NOT SHOWN EXCUSABLE NEGLECT FOR HIS FAILURE TO ANSWER THE COMPLAINT AND DEFENDANT HAS NOT ATTACHED A PROPOSED RESPONSIVE PLEADING AS REQUIRED BY C C P SECTION 473(B). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =301/PJB

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-31-2007 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-19-2007 Continued To Nov-13-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Sep-20-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Karen Farnsworth.
Kan Tung Donohoe, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Sharon Lin and Liang Lin.
Plaintiff's Witness: Sharon Lin, present with court certified Mandarin Interpreter: Connie Chen.
Witness and Interpreter were sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiffs and against the Defaulted Defendant: Chun Wan Tam aka Johnny Tam dba A & J Auto Service as follows:
Restitution $16,211.90
Prejudgment Interest $1,607.69
Costs $384.50 for a total of $18,204.09
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-07-2007 Set For Order To Show Cause On Oct-01-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-28-2007 Continued To Aug-17-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
